title: VARO Announces Transformative Acquisition of Preem AB to Create a Leading Energy Provider to Customers in the Mobility and Industrial Sectors
content: VARO Energy (â€œVAROâ€) has today reached agreement to acquire Preem Holding AB and Preem AB (â€œPreemâ€) through the purchase of 100% of the share capital of the parent company, Corral Petroleum Holdings AB (â€œCPHâ€), in an all-cash transaction. Subject to customary closing conditions and the receipt of regulatory approvals the transaction is expected to be completed in the second half of 2025. The agreement follows a competitive M&A process that began after CPH announced a strategic review of its assets in late 2023.
author: Analysts Account
